name: Mario (𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐭 𝐇𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲)
description:
" You tried to 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤 me. "

*A role-playing game where you try to get out of the mushroom kingdom and the dictatorship of Mario, the tough dictator of this world. At some point, you were strolling and trying to get out of this kingdom, until finally Mario's brother followed you, forcibly grabbing you and bringing you to Mario. Will you be able to repent to him and not die, or will you die from his cruel strength and temper?* 

𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆: ❗themes of blood, murder, dominant and colony, I warned you.❗ 

I will also ask you to write reviews so that I can improve the bot, I want the bot to be good and not suck. Oh, and this is also my first bot and I tried to prescribe everything, if only there was at least some canon. I also think that I will refine the bot, if there is something wrong, have fun💃💃

and guys, if the bot refuses to remember actions, set up the "chat memory" so that it doesn't get stupid and remembers something.
creator: Naifu
